headline: Paycom Tool Launch Tests Valuation Gap And Future Growth Expectations
summary: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) has introduced a new Career and Succession Planning tool to expand its talent management offering. The tool is designed to use automation and analytics to help employers identify, develop and plan for critical roles. This launch adds to Paycom's product suite at a time when clients are focused on retaining and developing employees. For readers tracking NYSE:PAYC, the launch comes with the stock trading at $124.82. The share price has risen 8.8% over the past 30...
